title: Best Restaurants in Phuket Thailand (2026)
meta_description: Curated Phuket restaurant guide with strong Old Town and Southern Thai picks, plus source-backed restaurant references.
intro: These Phuket restaurant picks are curated for travelers who want the island to feel more specific than generic resort dining. The strongest cluster is still Phuket Old Town, where Southern Thai, Chinese-Peranakan, and breakfast-oriented spots make the island's food identity much clearer.

items.name: Tu Kab Khao
items.description: One of the clearest first Phuket restaurant picks if you want Southern Thai food in a historic Old Town setting rather than another beach-strip menu.
items.location: Phang Nga Road, Phuket Old Town
items.current_info: Cuisine: Southern Thai • Fit: heritage-setting dinner • Source: MICHELIN Guide

items.name: One Chun
items.description: A dependable Old Town favorite for family-style Southern Thai dishes, especially if you want classic Phuket flavors in a setting that still feels rooted in the island.
items.location: Thep Krasattri Road, Phuket Old Town
highlights: Strong Old Town lunch or dinner
items.current_info: Cuisine: Southern Thai • Fit: classic Phuket Town meal • Source: MICHELIN Guide

items.name: Royd
items.description: Royd is a strong destination-dining pick if you want contemporary Southern Thai cooking with a tighter chef-led format and local ingredients.
items.current_info: Cuisine: Southern Thai, Contemporary • Fit: special dinner • Source: MICHELIN Guide

items.name: Blue Elephant Phuket
items.description: A more polished occasion-style meal in Phuket Town, best for travelers who want a formal setting inside one of the island's historic mansion buildings.
items.current_info: Cuisine: Thai • Fit: special-occasion town dinner • Source: official restaurant website

items.name: Roti Thaew Nam
items.description: A classic breakfast stop that matters because Phuket's morning food culture is part of what makes the island feel local beyond the beach circuit.
items.location: Thep Krasattri Road, Phuket Old Town
items.current_info: Cuisine: Small eats / breakfast • Fit: early-day Old Town stop • Source: MICHELIN Guide

items.name: A Pong Mae Sunee
items.description: One of the best quick stops in Phuket Town if you want a specific local snack rather than a full sit-down meal.
highlights: Pairs well with Old Town walking
items.current_info: Cuisine: Street food / snack • Fit: short local stop • Source: MICHELIN Guide
